title: Masters of the Universe
posterAlt: Masters of the Universe (2026) movie poster
tmdbOverview: After being separated for 15 years, the Sword of Power leads Prince Adam back to Eternia, where he discovers his home shattered under the fiendish rule of Skeletor. To save his family and his world, Adam must join forces with his closest allies, Teela and Duncan/Man-At-Arms, and embrace his true destiny as He-Man — the most powerful man in the universe.
synopsis: Released in 2026, Masters of the Universe is a action, fantasy and science fiction film from United States. It holds a solid 7.2 rating on TMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a PG-13 certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
